mapper.select: SELECT MA003, SUM(LE014 + LE021 - LE017 - LE024) capitalFlow FROM ACTLE LEFT JOIN ACTMA ON LE001 = MA001 WHERE MA023 = 'Y' AND LE002 = SUBSTRING(CONVERT(CHAR(8), DATEADD(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()), 112), 1, 4) AND LE003 = SUBSTRING(CONVERT(CHAR(8), DATEADD(MONTH, 0, GETDATE()), 112), 5, 2) GROUP BY MA003

SELECT CONCAT(LE002, LE003) AS MandY, SUM(LE014+LE021-LE017-LE024) AS capitalFlow FROM ACTLE LEFT JOIN ACTMA ON LE001=MA001 WHERE MA023='Y' AND LE002=SUBSTRING(CONVERT(CHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112), 1, 4) AND LE003=SUBSTRING(CONVERT(CHAR(8), GETDATE(), 112), 5, 2) GROUP BY LE002, LE003
UNION ALL
SELECT CONCAT(LE002, LE003) AS MandY, SUM(LE014+LE021-LE017-LE024) AS 资金流 FROM ACTLE LEFT JOIN ACTMA ON LE001=MA001 WHERE MA023='Y' AND LE002=SUBSTRING(CONVERT(CHAR(8), DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE()), 112), 1, 4) AND LE003=SUBSTRING(CONVERT(CHAR(8), DATEADD(MONTH, -1, GETDATE()), 112), 5, 2) GROUP BY LE002, LE003
